analysis.name: Pendle
analysis.summary: Pendle近期因代币回购空投、上线Revolut及Monad链等利好上涨，但30日跌幅仍大，需谨慎。
catalysts: Pendle回购170万枚代币并空投sPENDLE持有者
Arthur Hayes买入340万美元DeFi代币（含PENDLE）

latestNews.title: Pendle buys back 1.7M tokens, distributes $1.4M in airdrops to sPENDLE holders
latestNews.reason: 回购减少流通，空投激励持有者

latestNews.title: A New Partnership Unveiled — Pendle Launches on Monad
latestNews.reason: 拓展新链生态，增加TVL潜力

latestNews.title: PENDLE Token Goes Live on Revolut, Reaching 20M EEA Crypto Traders
latestNews.reason: 增加用户基础和流动性

latestNews.title: Arthur Hayes Deploys $3.4 Million into 4 DeFi Tokens: Bet on 2026 Comeback?
latestNews.reason: 知名人物买入，市场情绪提振

fundamentals: Pendle是收益代币化协议，允许交易未来收益
TVL曾达83亿美元，目前约30亿美元（估算）
代币用于治理和费用分成
marketRead: 24小时涨幅38%，7日涨幅8.6%，短期反弹强劲
成交量2500万美元，流动性一般
risks: 30日跌幅较大，反弹持续性存疑
市场整体情绪不明，DeFi板块波动大
代币解锁风险（总供应2.8亿，流通1.7亿）
新闻催化可能已部分定价
sourceNotes: 新闻来源为Google News聚合，时效性较好

profile.name: Pendle
profile.description: Pendle is a protocol that enables the tokenization and trading of future yield. With the creation of a novel AMM that supports assets with time decay, Pendle gives users more control over future yield by providing optionality and opportunities for its utilization.
